name: Human
description: Adaptable and ambitious, humans are the most widespread ancestry. Their diversity of culture and talent lets them thrive in any environment.

name: Dwarf
description: Stout and resilient, dwarves are master crafters who build great halls beneath the mountains. Their endurance and tenacity are legendary.

name: Wode Elf
description: Wild and fierce, wode elves dwell in ancient forests. They are supernaturally swift and possess an innate connection to the natural world.

name: High Elf
description: Graceful and long-lived, high elves are scholars and arcanists who build cities of breathtaking beauty. Their mastery of magic is unrivaled.

name: Orc
description: Proud and powerful, orcs are natural warriors whose strength and endurance make them formidable combatants. Their communities value honor and martial prowess.

name: Polder
description: Small but resourceful, polders are nimble folk known for their cunning and stealth. They make excellent scouts and infiltrators.

name: Hakaan
description: Towering and powerful, hakaan are a proud people with an innate connection to elemental forces. Their large frames and stoic nature make them natural protectors.

name: Dragon Knight
description: Born with the blood of dragons, dragon knights are draconic humanoids with breath weapons, scales, and an innate majesty that commands respect.

name: Memonek
description: Beings from the Plane of Utterance, memonek are tall and slender with an innate ability to perceive and manipulate the flow of communication and thought.

name: Revenant
description: Returned from death by sheer force of will, revenants are undead beings who retain their identity and purpose. They do not age and need not eat or breathe.
